prestazioni: Upgrade the N63B44T3 (4.4L V8 twin-turbo) with a bespoke ALPINA-derived hybrid turbo setup featuring Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducers, and 3D-printed Inconel turbine housings to handle 22 psi of boost while maintaining ALPINA’s signature linear power delivery (target: 850whp on E85, 780whp on 93 octane).

Replace the factory 10.5:1 compression pistons with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, paired with a custom ALPINA-specific Schrick camshaft profile (288° intake / 292° exhaust, 12.5mm lift) to optimize airflow for the upgraded turbos while preserving low-end torque.

Install a full Akrapovič Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system with 3.5" diameter mandrel-bent downpipes, 200-cell catalytic converters, and a valved center muffler delete, paired with an ALPINA-tuned xHP Stage 3 TCU flash to eliminate torque management delays and enable launch control at 4,500 RPM.
estetica: Fit a full ALPINA B7 LCI-specific Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with integrated ALPINA-specific cooling ducts for the upgraded turbos, retaining the OEM Alpina kidney grilles but replacing the slats with carbon fiber inserts.

Replace the factory 22" Alpina Classic wheels with custom HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (22x10.5 ET35 front, 22x12 ET40 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/30 front, 325/25 rear) for track-focused grip, paired with ALPINA-branded Brembo GT-R monoblock calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 420mm two-piece rotors.

Install a Vorsteiner carbon fiber engine cover with ALPINA script inlay, paired with a custom ALPINA-specific Gintani carbon fiber front lip spoiler and a rear wing modeled after the ALPINA B7 GT3 race car, featuring a 3D-printed Gurney flap for adjustable downforce.
